title: Lucky Vanilla
description: A super optimized and qol enhanced version of minecraft that works on Vanilla Servers
body:
# **Features**

Works on Vanilla Servers

Increases FPS through performance mods and bug patches

Adds QOL mods that help navigate menues, allow for new hot keys, free cam, zoom, etc

Simple Voice Chat to allow you to use voice chat (on servers that support it)

# **QOL Mods**

AppleSkin (by squeek502)

Armor Poser (by Mrbysco, ShyNieke)

AutoFishingDeluxe (by Syzes)

BetterF3 (by cominixo, TreyRuffy)

Camera Utils (by Max Henkel)

Client Tweaks (by BlayTheNinth)

Controlling (by Jaredlll08)

Duper's AutoWalk (by Dupernite)

Entity Model Features (by Traben)

Entity Texture Features (by Traben)

Freecam (by hashalite, Matt Sturgeon)

Inventory Profiles Next (by mirinimi/blackd)

Iris (by coderbot, IMS212, Justsnoopy30, FoundationGames)

LambDynamicLights (by LambdAurora)

Librarian Trade Finder (by Greenman999#8421)

Litematica (by masa)

MiniHUD (by masa)

Mod Menu (by Prospector, haykam821, TerraformersMC)

Mouse Tweaks (by Ivan Molodetskikh (YaLTeR)

Peek (by Max Henkel)

Ping Wheel (by Luken)

Reese's Sodium Options (by FlashyReese)

Searchables (by Jaredlll08)

Simple Voice Chat (by Max Henkel)

SkinShuffle (by IMB11 (mineblock11), enjarai)

Tweakeroo (by masa)


# **Performance Mods**

# **Dependents**
